title: rulac californica
intro: Rulac californica, also known as California prickly poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Rulac californica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Rulac californica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for external and internal use.
